commit.author: Hermes Agent
commit.subject: Initial commit: Cursor ACE Orchestrator PRDs, Workflow and Specs

analysis_result.analysis: This commit establishes a comprehensive foundational layer for the project by introducing over 1,100 lines of documentation, PRDs, and technical specifications. While the tracking files (plan.md and changelog.md) were not updated in this specific commit, the addition of core architectural specs provides high systemic value for the upcoming development phases.
analysis_result.suggested_message: docs: initialize project with Cursor ACE Orchestrator PRDs, workflow definitions, and technical specifications
